title: keeper-integrations.v1 (scaffold)
description: Scaffold-only schema for the keeper-integrations family (P12 in docs/V2_DECISIONS.md). No body yet — landing as part of P12 work. Validators MUST reject any manifest that declares this schema with a non-empty body until x-keeper-live-proof.status leaves 'scaffold-only'.

x-keeper-live-proof.notes: Top-level keys planned: domains, scim_endpoints, automator_endpoints, email_configs, audit_alerts, api_keys. See docs/V2_DECISIONS.md Q1.
